title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Crompton Greaves

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Crompton Greaves
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!
